title: Kimberley Jim
actors: Jim Reeves, Madeleine Usher, Clive Parnell
plot: The story tells of a ramblin', gamblin', guitar-strummin' man from Dixie, trying to strike it rich in the Kimberley Diamond region. Accompanying him is his mischievous side-kick - a man with a song in his heart and four aces up hi...
